goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'british' food and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'price range', and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 16:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'ely'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from ely
Make sure you get travel time
